Class NewDifferenceEngine.DifferenceListener2DifferenceEvaluator

java.lang.Object
org.custommonkey.xmlunit.NewDifferenceEngine.DifferenceListener2DifferenceEvaluator
All Implemented Interfaces:
DifferenceEvaluator
Enclosing class:
NewDifferenceEngine
public static class NewDifferenceEngine.DifferenceListener2DifferenceEvaluator extends Object implements DifferenceEvaluator
Adapts XMLUnit 1.x DifferenceListener to XMLUnit 2.x DifferenceEvaluator.
